    • Method Detail

      • getFilterBank

        public int getFilterBank()
        Tag storage area
        Returns:
        0x00:Reserve, 0x01:EPC, 0x02:TID, 0x03:USR

        Parameters:
        filterBank - 0x00:Reserve, 0x01:EPC, 0x02:TID, 0x03:USR

      • getFilterLength

        public int getFilterLength()
        Filter data length
        Returns:
        过滤数据长度(单位:bit),当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤 ( Filter data length(unit:bit), when filter data length is 0, it means no filter.)

      • setFilterLength

        public void setFilterLength(int filterLength)
        Filter data length
        Parameters:
        filterLength - 过滤数据长度(单位:bit),当过滤的数据长度为0时，表示无过滤 ( Filter data length(unit:bit), when filter data length is 0, it means no filter.)
